productDisplayName: Hanes Women Pack of Three 100% Cotton Plain Hipsters

Crafted using soft absorbent cotton with a fabric covered waistband, the brief contours your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The printed label on the inner allows abrasion-free comfort while the superior stretch elastic is perfect for better leg movement.
